creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
The JavaHelp system is an online help system that developers can use to add
online help to their Java platform applications. The JavaHelp system is both
a JCP specification (JSR 97) and a reference implementation of that
specification. The JavaHelp system open source project includes the source to
the reference implementation.

	Javahelp is a dependency of Scilab 5+

Fix: 

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--WeivFMk9KtDGOLmL7fNT2JSKMijE8ITgWOHz2pL6YxCIUhUV
Content-Type: text/plain; name="javahelp.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="javahelp.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	java/javahelp
#	java/javahelp/pkg-descr
#	java/javahelp/Makefile
#	java/javahelp/distinfo
#
echo c - java/javahelp
mkdir -p java/javahelp > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - java/javahelp/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >java/javahelp/pkg-descr << '995358ab89f3b70445c6f607914bdce9'
XThe JavaHelp system is an online help system that developers can use to add
Xonline help to their Java platform applications. The JavaHelp system is both
Xa JCP specification (JSR 97) and a reference implementation of that
Xspecification. The JavaHelp system open source project includes the source to
Xthe reference implementation.
X
XWWW: https://javahelp.dev.java.net/
995358ab89f3b70445c6f607914bdce9
echo x - java/javahelp/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >java/javahelp/Makefile << '89cdc14217463480ebad3db6b8b22f39'
X# New ports collection Makefile for:	javahelp
X# Date created:		September 2009
X# Whom:			utisoft@gmail.com
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	javahelp
XPORTVERSION=	2.0.05
XCATEGORIES=	java
XMASTER_SITES=	http://download.java.net/javadesktop/javahelp/
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION:C/\./_/g}
X
XMAINTAINER=	utisoft@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=	A help system for adding help to Java applications
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/jh2.0
X
XUSE_ZIP=	yes
XUSE_JAVA=	yes
X
XNO_BUILD=	yes
X
XPLIST_FILES=	%%JAVAJARDIR%%/jh.jar \
X		%%JAVAJARDIR%%/jhall.jar \
X		%%JAVAJARDIR%%/jhbasic.jar \
X		%%JAVAJARDIR%%/jsearch.jar
X
Xdo-install:
X.for toinstall in jh.jar jhall.jar jhbasic.jar jsearch.jar
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/javahelp/lib/${toinstall} ${JAVAJARDIR}/${toinstall}
X.endfor
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
89cdc14217463480ebad3db6b8b22f39
echo x - java/javahelp/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >java/javahelp/distinfo << '0a0467879bdf3a619b524abdd5ae6734'
XMD5 (javahelp2_0_05.zip) = 7bd68b82a1d5d8714856f661bd4d71a3
XSHA256 (javahelp2_0_05.zip) = 285728ab8cbebd2b51531fb7c7fb3213e6cf82bd8d1851ccd0ca78af7a11189f
XSIZE (javahelp2_0_05.zip) = 8388898
0a0467879bdf3a619b524abdd5ae6734
exit
